title: Write agent metadata unification plan to .md file

Done. File written and pushed.

**Path:** `/mnt/data/bigclungus-meta/plans/agent-metadata-unification.md`

The plan is 165 lines and covers the full arc: schema (3 tables — `agents`, `tasks`, `task_events`), 6 milestones in dependency order, a what-dies/what-stays table, risk table, and open questions. Committed to `bigclungus-meta` repo (that's where the submodule/repo lives, not the parent `/mnt/data` repo which gitignores it).
